_meta.description: TaxAid Financial Analytics — Complete website data for API integration

__comment: main dashboard: 9 widget components assembled in a 12-col grid layout

mainDashboard._note: Root dashboard page. Composed of 9 widget components rendered in a 12-column grid. Each widget links to its own detail page.

revenue._note: Semi-circle gauge showing current-year revenue achievement vs target. Left sidebar widget.

cashflow._note: Area chart showing Real vs Hypothetical cash-flow scenarios over 6 months (May–Oct). Animated sweep-right entry.

financialStatements._note: Three circular-arc gauges showing Revenue Growth, Net Profit Margin, and Liquidity Status.

indirectExpense._note: Irregular pie chart with percentage labels showing breakdown of indirect operating expenses.

accountReceivables._note: Stacked bar chart showing aging-bucket receivables (Jan–Jun) across 4 buckets: <30, 31-60, 61-90, >90 days.

cogs._note: KPI card showing COGS-to-Revenue ratio (65%) with a mini wave sparkline. Links to full COGS detail page.
cogs.footerText:
Achieved greater operational efficiency.
Now unlocking higher profit margins.
cogs.footerTextAr:
تم تحقيق كفاءة تشغيلية أكبر.
والآن يتم فتح هوامش ربح أعلى.

accountsPayable._note: KPI card showing total outstanding payables with a mini bar sparkline and overdue/upcoming breakdown.

costCenter._note: KPI card showing active project count with a mini wave sparkline and a contextual note about recent additions.
costCenter.footerText:
Atria.co recently added 2 new projects.
Strengthening operational activity.
costCenter.footerTextAr:
أضافت Atria.co مؤخرًا مشروعين جديدين.
تعزيز النشاط التشغيلي.

taxQueries._note: KPI card showing AI token usage with a donut gauge and upcoming VAT / Corporate Tax return due dates.

__comment: revenue page: Summary, Gauge, By Category, Trend, and Top Customers
__comment: financial-statement page: Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Ratios, and Tabs
__comment: indirect-expense page: Summary, Top Categories, Overhead Trends, and Revenue Comparison

auth._note: Login, Sign-up, and Forgot-password flow for the main TaxAid application

onboarding._note: 12-step onboarding wizard shown after the user logs in for the first time

dashboard._note: Top-level tab navigation config for the Team Member dashboard

activityTracking._note: Work-session timer, daily activity table, and monthly summary metric cards

monthlySummary.totalInternalHoursNote: Internal meetings and tasks this month

clientManagement._note: Client Request Pool table and Client Fixed Summary table with status filters

masterlist._note: Client project masterlist split into Client Fixed / Client Review / Client Analysis sub-tabs

ticketingDashboard._note: Team Member ticketing screen — metric cards, ticket table, create/view ticket modals

tickets.title: Add dark mode feature
tickets.description: Clients are requesting ability to export multiple reports at once instead of one-by-one downloads.

activity.comment: Important security feature. Can use existing libraries. 4 weeks.

tickets.title: Add two-factor authentication
tickets.description: Integrate 2FA using TOTP for better security.

tickets.title: Add two-factor authentication
tickets.description: Login page crashes on submitting with empty password.

tickets.title: Add two-factor authentication
tickets.description: Two factor auth implementation for admin panel.

activityLog._note: Historical daily activity log accessible via 'Activity Log History' button; date-navigable

dashboard._note: Review Manager main dashboard — 6-tab navigation covering all manager views

productivityMetrics._page: pages/review-manager/dashboard.vue → All tabs (always shown at top)
productivityMetrics._note: Four KPI metric cards rendered above the tab bar on every manager tab

cards.title: Number of open requests from clients

productivityTracker._note: Table of all consultants with their open Fixed and Adhoc request counts

dataSyncStatus._note: Shows last sync date, sync health (Synced / Not Synced) and responsible consultant per client

clientFixedProgress._note: Progress bar table showing how far each consultant has completed their client fixed review steps

consultantWorkload._note: Hours worked per consultant broken down by Client Fixed, Client Request, and Client Analysis

assignConsultant._note: New clients pending consultant assignment; dropdown lists available consultants with their active-client counts

clientReviewAnalysis._page: pages/review-manager/dashboard.vue → tab: Client review analysis progress
clientReviewAnalysis._note: Shows appointment type (Client Review / Client Analysis) per consultant-client pair and any delay reason

activityLog._note: Consultant activity log history — accessible via 'Consultant Activity Log History' button on the Productivity tracker tab

partnerInfo._note: Logged-in partner identity shown in the dashboard header

overviewMetrics._page: pages/revenue-partnership/accounts.vue → tab: Overview → Overview Metrics section
overviewMetrics._note: Three summary KPI cards shown at the top of the Overview tab

paymentStatusMetrics._page: pages/revenue-partnership/accounts.vue → tab: Overview → Payment Status Overview section
paymentStatusMetrics._note: Three payment-status summary cards (Paid, Failed, Settlements)

customerManagement._page: pages/revenue-partnership/accounts.vue → tab: Operations → Customer Management section
customerManagement._note: Four sub-tabs each rendering a different table: Partners, Direct Customers, Notify Customers, User Master Info

partners._page: pages/revenue-partnership/accounts.vue → Operations → Customer Management → Partners sub-tab

directCustomers._page: pages/revenue-partnership/accounts.vue → Operations → Customer Management → Direct Customers sub-tab

notifyCustomers._page: pages/revenue-partnership/accounts.vue → Operations → Customer Management → Notify Customers sub-tab
notifyCustomers._note: Cards expiring in under 30 days — triggers the yellow alert banner at the top of the page

userMasterInfo._page: pages/revenue-partnership/accounts.vue → Operations → Customer Management → User Master Info sub-tab
userMasterInfo._note: Full customer contact and payment method details

paymentToPartnerModal._page: pages/revenue-partnership/accounts.vue → Operations tab → 'Payment to Partner' button → modal
paymentToPartnerModal._note: List of partners available in the Select Partner dropdown inside the payment modal

alerts._note: Yellow warning banner shown when expiring cards are detected
